title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_grep
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_grep' MCP tool.

root.description: Repo path, array of paths, or "*" for all MCP roots.

mode.description: `S` = pickaxe string (`git log -S`); `G` = pickaxe regex (`git log -G`).

term.description: Search term / regex for pickaxe history.

pickaxe.description: Pickaxe history search. Returns `commits[]` (sha + subject) per root.

ref.description: Commit/branch/tag to use as the history tip. Must be a safe ref token.

paths.description: Limit history to these paths (must resolve within the repo root).

maxMatches.description: Max commits per root (hard cap 1000, default 200).
